title: Breakfast Conversation 早餐对话
scene: 一家人早上在餐桌上吃早餐聊天。

lines.en: Good morning, Tom. Time for breakfast!
lines.zh: 早上好，汤姆。该吃早餐了！

lines.en: Good morning, Mom. What is for breakfast?
lines.zh: 早上好，妈妈。早餐吃什么？

lines.en: I made eggs, bread, and milk today.
lines.zh: 今天做了鸡蛋、面包和牛奶。

lines.en: Yummy! My favorite. Can I have some jam?
lines.zh: 好吃！我最喜欢的。能来点果酱吗？

lines.en: Sure. Here is the strawberry jam.
What time is it? I do not want to be late.
It is seven o'clock. You have plenty of time.
Yes. A sandwich, an apple, and some juice.
lines.zh: 装了。一个三明治、一个苹果和一些果汁。

lines.en: Thank you, Mom. I will wash my face and brush my teeth.
lines.zh: 谢谢你，妈妈。我去洗脸刷牙。
